query:
INSERT INTO bambina_checklist (category, phase, title, description, due_week, sort_order) VALUES
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase expressing equipment from Amazon Mexico', 'Breast pump, nursing pads, bags for milk, cooler, lanolina cream, ice packs, sharpie, disinfecting wipes', 32, 50),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase baby bottles & feeding supplies', 'MAM self-sterilising bottles, formula milk, bottle brush, milk prep machine provided by MSJ', 32, 51),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase nappies & changing supplies', 'Nappies, wipes, nappy cream, nappy sacks, changing pad, change bag', 34, 52),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase baby clothing', 'Vests, babygrows, hats, socks, mittens, bibs, muslins', 34, 53),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase bathing supplies', 'Baby bathtub provided by MSJ, body wash/shampoo, soft towels, baby hairbrush, nail clippers', 34, 54),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase health & safety items', 'Car seat, baby monitor, first aid kit, thermometer, baby-friendly laundry detergent', 34, 55),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Purchase travel & on-the-go gear', 'Pushchair (car seat compatible), baby carrier/sling, travel changing mat, buggy shade (SnoozeShade)', 36, 56),
('shopping', 'third_trimester', 'Confirm sleeping items with MSJ', 'Next-to-me cot (Chicco) and mattress provided by MSJ, confirm cot sheets (3-4) at 28 weeks', 28, 57);
